The '''6X4 fusial thrust engine''' was an [[Ion engine/Legends|ion drive]] [[Engine/Legends|engine]] designed by [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]]. Four 6X4 fusial thrust engines were installed in standard models of the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapan]] [[Miy'til starfighter]].
